历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 22337 → 37468 → 38767 → 35656 → 29638, showing an overall trend of first declining and then rising; rankings dropped significantly in 2022–2023 (affected by factors such as gaps), and rebounded for two consecutive years in 2024–2025, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 29638, recovering about 9100 places from the low in 2023; the enrollment plan was 60 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 55 in 2025, and maintained at 55 in 2026, unchanged from 2025; the plan did not expand, so competitive pressure was not alleviated by an increase in plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the main ranking of Soft Science has been rising continuously, reaching approximately 44th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management response public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 8th (high heat), with high short video exposure and relatively high application attention; in 2022, there was a sharp drop in admission scores (Anhui, Guangxi), and in 2025, the admission scores showed an abnormally low level nationwide (Heilongjiang 389 points admitted), historical gap signals may have a lagging effect on application psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Hot majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended, highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors of Zhengzhou University (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), and the popularity of related majors has a positive pull on overall applications; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 380,000, indicating intensified competition; Zhengzhou University is located in Henan, and it is a cross-provincial enrollment in Jiangsu.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 29638, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the significant increase in Jiangsu candidates (intensified competition), and the somewhat negative school reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 29438, with a range of 28938–29938.
